summary: Complete testing of 3-Layer Financial Architecture refactoring. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified including Tesoreria page, Dashboard Financiero with 3-layer labels, Reportes with treasury data, and Sidebar navigation.

backend_api.GET /api/tesoreria: PASS - List treasury movements with pagination and filters (tipo, fecha, origen_tipo)
backend_api.GET /api/tesoreria?tipo=ingreso: PASS - Filter by tipo works correctly
backend_api.GET /api/tesoreria?tipo=egreso: PASS - Filter by tipo works correctly
backend_api.GET /api/tesoreria/resumen: PASS - Returns complete KPIs: total_ingresos, total_egresos, flujo_neto, saldo_total, por_origen, cuentas
backend_api.POST /api/tesoreria (manual ingreso): PASS - Creates manual treasury ingreso movement
backend_api.POST /api/tesoreria (manual egreso): PASS - Creates manual treasury egreso movement
backend_api.GET /api/dashboard-financiero: PASS - Returns 3-layer KPIs with cobranzas_reales and egresos_reales from treasury
backend_api.GET /api/finanzas-gerencial/flujo-caja-g: PASS - Returns timeline from cont_movimiento_tesoreria with source='tesoreria'
backend_api.GET /api/reportes/resumen-ejecutivo: PASS - Includes flujo_caja_mtd with ingresos_reales and egresos_reales from treasury
backend_api.GET /api/reportes/exportar/tesoreria: PASS - Returns CSV with correct headers (ID, Fecha, Tipo, Monto, Origen, etc.)
backend_api.CxC abono integration: PASS - create_cxc_abono auto-creates treasury movement (verified in code)
backend_api.CxP abono integration: PASS - create_cxp_abono auto-creates treasury movement (verified in code)

frontend_ui.Tesoreria KPIs section: PASS - Shows Saldo Total, Ingresos Periodo, Egresos Periodo, Flujo Neto
frontend_ui.Tesoreria cuentas cards: PASS - Shows financial accounts (Caja Chica, Cuenta BCP Soles)
frontend_ui.Tesoreria desglose por origen: PASS - Shows breakdown by origen_tipo (Manual ingreso/egreso)
frontend_ui.Tesoreria filtros section: PASS - Date filters, tipo dropdown, origen dropdown all working
frontend_ui.Tesoreria table: PASS - Shows movements with Fecha, Tipo, Monto, Origen, Concepto, Cuenta, Forma Pago, Marca columns
frontend_ui.Dashboard Financiero Capa 3 label: PASS - Shows 'CAPA 3: CAJA REAL / TESORERIA' section header
frontend_ui.Dashboard Financiero Capa 2 label: PASS - Shows 'CAPA 2: OBLIGACIONES (CXC / CXP)' section header
frontend_ui.Dashboard Financiero Flujo Neto Periodo: PASS - Shows 'Desde movimientos de tesoreria' subtitle
frontend_ui.Reportes Gerenciales flujo_caja_mtd: PASS - Shows 'Ingresos Reales MTD' and 'Egresos Reales MTD' from treasury
frontend_ui.Reportes Gerenciales Tesoreria export: PASS - Export button with data-testid='export-tesoreria' found
frontend_ui.Sidebar Tesoreria link: PASS - data-testid='nav-tesoreria' present under Finanzas Gerenciales section
frontend_ui.Sidebar Finanzas Gerenciales section: PASS - All 6 links present (Tesoreria, Flujo de Caja, Rentabilidad, Presupuesto vs Real, ROI Proyectos, Reportes Gerenciales)

3_layer_model.capa_1_comercial: What was sold/bought/expensed - tracks devengado (accrued) transactions
3_layer_model.capa_2_obligaciones: CxC/CxP pending - tracks receivables and payables
3_layer_model.capa_3_tesoreria: Actual cash movements - SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for cash flow

treasury_as_source_of_truth.dashboard_financiero: cobranzas_reales and egresos_reales read from cont_movimiento_tesoreria

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test treasury movements (manual ingreso S/100 and egreso S/50) via POST /api/tesoreria
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-Layer financial architecture fully implemented and tested. Treasury (cont_movimiento_tesoreria) is the single source of truth for cash flow. Dashboard Financiero shows 3 clearly labeled sections: Capa 3 Tesoreria, Capa 1 Comercial, Capa 2 Obligaciones. Tesoreria page at /tesoreria shows KPIs, cuentas, filters, and movements table. Reportes page shows flujo_caja_mtd with ingresos_reales/egresos_reales from treasury and has Tesoreria CSV export option. CxC abonos and CxP abonos auto-create treasury movements via treasury_service.py.
